scope: shared audio assets used identically by Deadrot games
notes: Master exports and generation history stay under packages/assets/sources/generated.
Code-generated placeholders are marked as replacementStatus=needs-elevenlabs until promoted.
Procedural fallback cues come from @deadrot/game-kit/audio DEADROT_SFX_PALETTE until promoted to authored samples.

assets.title: Breach Collapse SFX
assets.elevenLabsPrompt: A heavy non-musical sci-fi horror breach collapse: low metallic implosion, wet stone cracking, distant pressure-wave thump, toxic energy fizzling out. Designed for a dark pixel-art shooter when a monster portal seals. No melody, no vocals, one-shot, 1.5 to 2 seconds.

assets.title: Choir Whisper Ambience
assets.elevenLabsPrompt: Loopable alien hive-mind ambience for a dark pixel-art shooter: layered organic whispers with no words, sub-bass biotech hum, faint chitin clicks, toxic electrical shimmer. Seamless loop, eerie and quiet, 4 seconds.

assets.title: Hellfire Pulse Loop
assets.elevenLabsPrompt: Short Pyre hellfire power pulse for a dark pixel-art shooter: compressed flame whoomp, ember crackle, hot mechanical ignition, small bass kick. Aggressive but clean UI/gameplay cue, no vocals, no melody, under 1 second.

assets.title: Hit Impact SFX
assets.elevenLabsPrompt: Short meaty alien bullet impact for a dark pixel-art shooter: wet chitin slap, tiny bone crack, soft blood spurt, no tonal beep, one-shot, 0.25 seconds.

assets.title: Verdict Thunder
assets.licenseNote: Confirm the Suno account was Pro or Premier at generation time before shipping commercially.

proceduralFallbackCues.elevenLabsPrompt: Short meaty alien bullet impact for a dark pixel-art shooter: wet chitin slap, tiny bone crack, soft blood spurt, no tonal beep, one-shot, 0.25 seconds.
Rewarding alien headshot cue: sharp skull pop, wet crystalline crack, tiny bright metal ping, punchy but not musical, one-shot, 0.45 seconds.
Fast monster kill confirmation: crunchy organic collapse, wet splat, low gore thump, tiny debris scatter, arcade readable, no melody, one-shot, 0.5 seconds.
Gritty sci-fi weapon reload: magazine scrape, metal latch click, brief mechanical rack, dry and close-mic, dark shooter tone, one-shot, 0.7 seconds.
Dark arcade pickup cue: small glassy bio-energy suck-in, quick gold spark, warm confirm tick, not cute, no melody, one-shot, 0.35 seconds.
Player damage sting for a dark FPS: armor crunch, muffled body hit, short blood-pressure thump, harsh but readable, no voice, one-shot, 0.45 seconds.
Weapon switch UI/gameplay cue: fast metal slide, tiny selector click, low mechanical tick, satisfying and short, no melody, one-shot, 0.25 seconds.
Enemy wave warning cue: rising industrial alarm swell, distant hellish pressure, short distorted siren edge, no vocals, one-shot, 0.9 seconds.
Boss arrival sting: huge sub-bass creature roar blended with metal stress and distant war horn, oppressive, non-musical, one-shot, 1.4 seconds.

proceduralFallbackCues.currentSource: DEADROT_SFX_PALETTE procedural chord; separate long-form victory music exists as audio-victory-breach-sealed
proceduralFallbackCues.elevenLabsPrompt: Short victory stinger for a brutal pixel shooter: triumphant metal impact, bright synth-brass hit, crowdless arena release, no copyrighted motif, one-shot, 1.2 seconds.
Defeat sting for dark sci-fi shooter: descending industrial drone, broken armor clank, distant monster breath, bleak but short, no melody, one-shot, 1 second.
Energy shield hit cue: tight plasma snap, glassy deflection, tiny electric crackle, no cute chime, one-shot, 0.3 seconds.
Level-up fanfare for a dark survivor shooter: rising power surge, armored UI unlock, small triumphant synth-metal flourish, original, no retro chiptune, one-shot, 1.2 seconds.
Close-range sci-fi gore explosion: low blast, wet debris, stone dust, ember crackle tail, aggressive but mix-friendly, one-shot, 1 second.
Player dash whoosh: fast armored air displacement, hot plasma streak, tiny servo snap at end, no magic sparkle, one-shot, 0.45 seconds.
Empty weapon dry-fire: hollow trigger click, dead chamber tick, small mechanical rattle, close-mic, one-shot, 0.25 seconds.
Energy shield activation: quick charging hum, plasma membrane snap into place, low armor resonance, serious sci-fi tone, one-shot, 0.8 seconds.
Dark crystal pickup tick: brittle glass ping, faint energy inhale, tiny mineral sparkle, not cheerful, one-shot, 0.35 seconds.
Combo reward cue: three quick escalating metal UI hits with subtle power surge, brutal arcade energy, original, no chiptune melody, one-shot, 0.55 seconds.
Low health warning loop element: two muffled heartbeat thumps, distant tinnitus edge, armored suit stress, tense but not loud, one-shot, 0.9 seconds.
Scourge breach opening cue: deep organic portal groan, pressure swell, toxic electric hiss, wet stone movement, no music, one-shot, 1.5 seconds.
Dark game UI select tick: compact metal contact, tiny electronic confirm, restrained and readable, no tonal menu chime, one-shot, 0.2 seconds.
Gold earned cue for brutal pixel shooter: gritty coin clink, small treasure snap, warm metal sparkle without casino jingle, one-shot, 0.45 seconds.
Armored jump cue: short boot servo push, air puff, leather-metal movement, grounded and not cartoony, one-shot, 0.35 seconds.
Armored landing impact: heavy boot thud on metal-stone floor, small dust crunch, low body weight, one-shot, 0.4 seconds.
Construct/build cue: fast industrial clamp, welding spark burst, metal panel lock, compact strategy-game feedback, one-shot, 0.7 seconds.
Power-up activation: rising bio-mechanical charge, hot reactor shimmer, armored surge hit, heroic but dark, no melody, one-shot, 1 second.
Berserk pickup cue: savage reactor overdrive, blood-rage ignition, distorted flame roar, aggressive organic-metal surge, one-shot, 1 seconds.
Sci-fi laser shot: sharp plasma discharge, hot electrical tail, compact pew with weight, not toy-like, one-shot, 0.35 seconds.
